en: I got us the votes. You did?
ko: 표를 확보했어. 정말?

en: I went to Paul Porter, and I turned him.
ko: 폴 포터한테 가서 돌렸어.

en: And the three votes that he comes with. So we're up by three. No.
ko: 그가 데려오는 3표까지. 그럼 3표 앞서는 거네. 아니.

en: Including Harvey, we're up by one. No, we're not.
ko: 하비 포함하면 1표 앞서. 아니, 아니야.

en: Hardman's going after Ester's company. And he's not going to back off unless you vote against me.
ko: 하드만이 에스더 회사를 노리고 있어. 네가 내 반대표를 던지지 않으면 안 물러날 거야.

en: Lewis. I know what you're going to say. We can stop it.
ko: 루이스. 무슨 말 할지 알아. 막을 수 있어.

en: But I went to Jeffrey to get him to not sell his shares, and he told me that Hardman's offering 40% over asking.
ko: 근데 제프리한테 주식 안 팔라고 했더니 하드만이 시세보다 40% 더 준다더라.

en: Jeffrey agreed not to sell, but everyone else will. If Hardman can't get the stocks, he's going to buy the distributor.
ko: 제프리는 안 팔겠다고 했는데 나머진 다 팔 거야. 주식을 못 사면 유통사를 살 거고.

en: And if he can't buy the distributor, he's going to go after the contracts. Lewis.
ko: 유통사를 못 사면 계약서를 노릴 거야. 루이스.

en: Forstmann is his backer. I know.
ko: 포스트만이 후원자야. 알아.

en: Well, then you know that he has unlimited resources, and I can't fight a war on multiple fronts.
ko: 그럼 무한한 자원이 있다는 거 알잖아. 여러 전선에서 싸울 수가 없어.

en: I could tell you if you side with me, we'll figure out a way to save Ester's company.
ko: 내 편에 서면 에스더 회사 살릴 방법을 찾겠다고 할 수도 있어.

en: But I have a sister, too. I'm sorry.
ko: 근데 나도 여동생이 있어. 미안해.

en: Lewis.
ko: 루이스.

en: Whatever happens, I want you to know Pearson will
ko: 무슨 일이 있어도, 피어슨은

en: always consider Lit her partner.
ko: 항상 릿을 파트너로 여길 거야.

en: Hold your pretty head high.
You'll hear me whispering.
Won't you let me play?
Let the world know how I was.
Jessica. If it had been anybody other than his sister,
ko: 제시카. 여동생이 아니었다면

en: he would never even consider it. I know, Donna.
ko: 생각도 안 했을 거야. 알아, 도나.

en: And you don't have to apologize for him, because I know what a bastard Daniel Hardman is.
ko: 그를 대신 사과할 필요 없어. 다니엘 하드만이 얼마나 나쁜 놈인지 아니까.

en: Is there anything I can do? Yes.
ko: 내가 할 수 있는 게 있어? 응.

en: You still have some time before the vote.
ko: 투표 전까지 아직 시간 있어.

en: I asked Gretchen to find Harvey this morning.
ko: 오늘 아침 그레첸한테 하비 찾으라고 했어.

en: I asked the wrong person.
ko: 잘못된 사람한테 부탁했네.

en: I'll find him.
ko: 내가 찾을게.
